name: Chicken Tacos
instructions: Cook the chicken with onion and garlic until fully done.
Season with cumin and paprika if you have them.
Warm the tortillas.
Fill tortillas with chicken mixture and top with any extras like cheddar, avocado, cilantro, or lime.

name: Beef Tacos
instructions: Brown the beef with onion and garlic.
Add cumin and paprika if available and cook for another minute.
Warm the tortillas.
Assemble tacos and finish with any toppings you have.

name: Chicken Quesadilla
instructions: Cook the chicken and any optional vegetables.
Place tortilla in a skillet and add cheddar plus the chicken mixture.
Fold and cook on both sides until golden and melty.
Serve with sour cream or avocado if you have them.

name: Pasta with Garlic and Olive Oil
instructions: Cook the pasta until al dente.
Gently sauté garlic in olive oil.
Toss the pasta with the garlic oil.
Finish with red pepper flakes, parmesan, lemon, or parsley if available.

name: Sausage Tomato Pasta
instructions: Cook the sausage and break it up in a pan.
Add onion and garlic and cook until softened.
Add tomato and simmer into a quick sauce.
Toss with cooked pasta and finish with parmesan or basil if you have them.

name: Mushroom Pasta
instructions: Cook the pasta.
Sauté mushrooms and garlic in butter or oil until browned.
Toss with pasta.
Finish with parmesan and thyme if available.

name: Greek Salad
instructions: Chop cucumber and tomato.
Add feta and red onion if using.
Dress with olive oil and vinegar.
Top with olives if available.

name: Chicken Curry
instructions: Cook onion and garlic until soft.
Add chicken and brown lightly.
Add spices and tomato if you have them and simmer until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve over rice if available.

name: Chana Masala Style
instructions: Cook onion until softened.
Add tomato and spices if available.
Stir in chickpeas and simmer until flavorful.
Serve with rice if you have it.

name: Chicken Stir-Fry
instructions: Cook the chicken in a hot pan.
Add onion and bell pepper and stir-fry until crisp tender.
Add soy sauce plus garlic or ginger if available.
Serve with rice or top with sesame oil if you have it.

name: Vegetable Fried Rice
instructions: Scramble the egg in a hot pan and remove.
Cook vegetables in a little oil if using.
Add rice and soy sauce and stir-fry.
Return the egg to the pan and finish with green onion if available.

name: Thai Basil Chicken Style
instructions: Cook chicken with garlic in a hot pan.
Add soy sauce and chili flakes if you like heat.
Stir in basil and bell pepper if available.
Serve over rice.

name: Teriyaki Salmon Bowl Style
instructions: Cook the salmon until just done.
Season or glaze lightly with soy sauce.
Serve over rice.
Top with cucumber, avocado, green onion, or sesame seeds if available.

name: Bibimbap Style Bowl
instructions: Cook the rice and prepare the egg.
Cook any vegetables or beef you have separately.
Layer everything in a bowl over the rice.
Finish with soy sauce and green onion if available.

name: Chicken Adobo Style
instructions: Combine chicken with soy sauce and vinegar in a pan.
Add garlic, black pepper, and bay leaf if you have them.
Simmer until the chicken is cooked and the sauce reduces.
Serve with rice.

name: Chicken Shawarma Bowl Style
instructions: Cook chicken with garlic and warm spices if you have them.
Serve over rice.
Add cucumber and tomato for freshness.
Finish with yogurt sauce if available.

name: Paella Style Rice
instructions: Cook onion and tomato in a wide pan.
Add rice and stir with paprika if available.
Add protein and vegetables if using and cook until the rice is tender.
Finish with lemon.

name: Caldo Verde Style
instructions: Cook potato in broth until soft.
Mash or blend part of it for body.
Add greens and sausage if using.
Finish with garlic, onion, or olive oil if available.

name: Coq au Vin Style
instructions: Brown the chicken.
Cook onion and mushroom until softened.
Add garlic, carrot, and thyme if you have them and simmer together.
Finish with butter for richness if available.

name: Jerk Chicken Style
instructions: Season chicken with garlic and any spicy or herby extras you have.
Cook until browned and done.
Serve with rice and beans if available.
Finish with lime.

name: Tagine Style Chickpeas
instructions: Cook onion until softened.
Add tomato and spices if available.
Stir in chickpeas and carrot if using and simmer.
Finish with lemon.

name: Berbere Lentils Style
instructions: Cook onion and garlic first.
Add lentils and enough liquid to simmer.
Add tomato, ginger, and paprika if available.
Cook until tender and serve with rice if desired.

name: Red Beans and Rice Style
instructions: Cook onion first.
Add beans and seasoning ingredients if you have them.
Simmer until flavorful.
Serve over rice and add sausage if available.

name: Three Sisters Bowl Style
instructions: Cook squash until tender.
Add corn and beans and warm through.
Add onion, sage, and broth if available for more flavor.
Serve as a hearty bowl.
